description_long: This factory building complex consists of multiple rectangular structures arranged in a grid-like layout, connected by wide paved roads and open spaces. The main buildings feature flat roofs, large industrial windows, and several loading dock doors, typical of modern industrial facilities. Smaller auxiliary buildings and utility structures are positioned around the central factory halls, with visible rooftop machinery such as HVAC units and vents. The exterior is primarily finished in shades of gray and white, with some red and brown accents on certain facades and roof sections. The site includes parking areas, driveways, and what appear to be storage yards or container zones. The overall design is utilitarian, emphasizing function and efficient access for vehicles and personnel.
description: A modern industrial factory complex with multiple flat-roofed buildings, large windows, and visible rooftop machinery, arranged around paved roads and loading docks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main row of factory buildings with large windows and loading docks, plus auxiliary structures and parking areas.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the main buildings, the arrangement of loading docks, and the adjacent paved roads.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back sides of the factory buildings, storage yards, and additional utility structures.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary row of buildings, rooftop machinery, and the overall site layout.
